scope: Global first-principles audit for harmonic expansion + altered dominant + progression method continuity + AB/four-note orientation continuity. This milestone quantifies existing behavior and intentionally does not change voicing projection, source inventory, style rhythm, expression, bass, drums, API, or Agent runtime.

global_findings.principle: Expansion/alter choose source color before voicing; method lock and AB continuity must be style-neutral progression policies; drop-family projection remains unchanged.
